news.t: NEO Exchange Lands Another Mining Industry Listing With Migration of Major Precious Metals

holdings.infoBox: SIZE is an equity ETF with a total of 531 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 0.31%, Dell Technologies at 0.30%, Astera Labs at 0.29%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 0.29%, and Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company at 0.28%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI USA Size Factor ETF (SIZE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Low Size index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US stocks. Holdings are weighted by the inverse natural logarithm of their market capitalization. SIZE was launched on Apr 16, 2013 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: NEO Exchange Lands Another Mining Industry Listing With Migration of Major Precious Metals
data.text: TORONTO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $SIZE #MajorPreciousMetals--Major Precious Metals (NEO:SIZE), a Canadian exploration and mining company, is now trading on NEO.
